# SatTPV API

> Official documentation for the SatTPV REST API. SatTPV is a point-of-sale and repair shop management platform; this API exposes the same resources available in your account (customers, products, repairs, sales, services, inventory…) over HTTPS, with JSON requests and responses and Bearer-token authentication.

The full documentation is also available as a single Markdown file at [llms-full.txt](/docs/llms-full.txt).

Base URL for every endpoint (including authentication): `https://api-v3.sattpv.net`

## Getting started

- [Introduction](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/introduction): overview, base URL, response envelope, HTTP status codes.
- [Authentication](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/authentication): login endpoint, Bearer token usage, token lifetime (≥ 8 hours).

## API reference

### Customers

- [Customers overview](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/customers/): module overview and customer object schema.
- [List customers](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/customers/list): `GET /customers` with filters and pagination.
- [Get customer](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/customers/get): `GET /customers/{id}` with related repairs, sales, services, docs and credit history.
- [Create customer](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/customers/create): `POST /customers`.
- [Update customer](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/customers/update): `PUT /customers/{id}`.
- [Delete customer](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/customers/delete): `DELETE /customers/{id}`.

### Products

- [Products overview](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/products/): module overview and product object schema.
- [List products](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/products/list): `GET /products` with filters by name, brand, model, barcode, reference, serial, category and stock.
- [Get product](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/products/get): `GET /products/{id}` with serials, defectives, units log and per-shop stock.
- [Update product](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/products/update): `PUT /products/{id}`.
- [Delete product](https://https://sattpv-software.github.io/docs/api/products/delete): `DELETE /products/{id}`.

## Machine-readable specs

- [OpenAPI 3.1 specification](/docs/openapi.yaml)
